message:
fix(runtime): improve region state machine transitions

Refines region lifecycle management with stricter transition rules:

Finalizer handling:
- Use early return pattern in run_sync_finalizers (?-operator)
- When async finalizer is encountered, reinsert it to the region's
  finalizer stack and return, allowing scheduler to run it
- This prevents premature close when async finalizers remain

State transition fixes:
- Closing/Draining → Finalizing now requires BOTH no children AND no tasks
- Previously only checked for no children, which could finalize a region
  while tasks were still running
- Only begin_drain() if there are children (not just if in Closing state)

These changes ensure regions don't advance to Finalizing until all their
work is truly complete, and async finalizers are properly handled rather
than being silently ignored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
